item.title: 人工智能淘金热：超大规模企业乞讨、借用、交易以满足永不满足的人工智能需求
item.summary: The world's largest cloud providers are embracing innovative financing, partnerships, and infrastructure strategies as unprecedented AI demand drives what may become the largest industrial construction effort in modern history. The post AI Gold Rush: Hyperscalers Beg, Borrow, Deal to Meet Insatiable AI Demand appeared
